headlines.headline: Kelvik Power reports record quarterly revenue, up 7% year-over-year

sentiment.reasoning: Record quarterly revenue growth of 7% indicates strong operational performance and positive momentum for the company.

headlines.headline: Zelval Energy reports rising costs pressuring margins in wireless connectivity

sentiment.reasoning: Rising costs directly impacting margins is a negative signal for profitability that will likely weigh on financial results until addressed.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
